text: A black and white photograph showing the roofline of a dilapidated, single-story house with a tiled roof and exposed wooden framing. The house is situated next to a large, dark, corrugated metal structure. In the foreground, the dark roof of a vintage car (likely a sedan) is visible, featuring a small emblem on the rear window. The emblem depicts a stylized, lightning-bolt shaped figure with arms raised, wearing a crown or hat, and holding a small object. Utility wires and a wooden utility pole are visible on the right side of the frame.
